01 — About

What is CLINICON?

CLINICON 2026 is the flagship annual summit, a grand three-day gathering uniting medical students from across the nation and beyond for academic competition, athletic rivalry, and cultural celebration.

It is a space where clinical sharpness meets human connection, where the stethoscope and the cricket bat share equal standing, and where the next generation of healthcare leaders are forged under pressure and in community.

Special Milestone · 2026

CLINICON 2026 proudly marks the Anniversary of the Establishment of the Faculty of Medicine — honouring its legacy while inspiring those who carry it forward.

Three Pillars
🎓
Academic Excellence
Seven clinical competitions, case challenges, research showcases and professional development.
🏆
Sports & Recreation
Team and individual sports, plus eSports tournaments across three intense days.
🌍
Community & Culture
Cultural nights and the social fabric that defines medicine.

Organised by Worlin Education

02 — Academic Programme

Compete Clinically

Seven flagship events designed to test, challenge and celebrate the finest clinical minds.

01
🧠
Quiz Championship

High-stakes medical knowledge battle spanning anatomy, pharmacology, pathology and clinical medicine.

KnowledgeView Rules →
02
⚖️
Debate Cup

Oxford-style debates on clinical ethics, health policy, and medical controversies judged by faculty.

Critical ThinkingView Rules →
03
🩺
OSCE

Objective Structured Clinical Examination — real patient encounters, clinical skills, and diagnostic reasoning under pressure.

Clinical SkillsView Rules →
04
🩻
Pixel Prognosis

Radiology and image interpretation challenge — read X-rays, CTs, and MRIs against the clock.

RadiologyView Rules →
05
🎭
Clinical Charades

Act out clinical signs, diagnoses, and procedures in this uniquely medical spin on the classic game.

Fun & LearningView Rules →
06
🎤
JAM — Just a Minute

Speak on a medical topic for a full minute — no hesitation, no repetition, no deviation.

CommunicationView Rules →
07
📋
Research Showcase

Present original research, case studies, and systematic reviews to a panel of distinguished faculty judges.

Research

04 — Community & Culture

Together, Beyond.

Where the white coat comes off and community comes alive.

🏥
Health Outreach & Open Screening Camp

Students conduct open screenings, health education sessions, and community outreach — taking medicine beyond campus walls for real-world impact.

🎶
Social Mixer / DJ Night

Unwind, connect, and celebrate with fellow medical students from across institutions. A night of music, energy, and friendships that outlast graduation.

🔥
Bonfire Night

Stories, songs, and sparks under the open sky — an intimate gathering to reflect on the journey and forge lifelong bonds in medicine.

🎭
Cultural Night

A spectacular showcase of music, dance, drama, and heritage — celebrating the rich diversity of the medical student community across cultures and borders.

⚠ Important Notice for All Students of Faculty of Medicine, Foča

Team Selection Trials
May 2026

With final examinations scheduled for June & July 2026 and students returning in October for the summit, all trials will be held in May 2026. Register now to receive trial notifications before spots fill.

CLINICON 🎉
05 — Why CLINICON

What Makes It Unforgettable

Five dimensions that set CLINICON apart from every other medical student gathering.

🌐
International Participation

Delegations from institutions across borders, bringing a global clinical perspective to every competition.

🩺
Real Patient OSCE

Structured clinical encounters with real patients — the closest a student gets to ward rounds in a competition setting.

🎓
Distinguished Faculty

Keynotes and mentoring by leading clinicians, researchers, and healthcare innovators.

🤝
Diplomatic Representation

Official inter-faculty delegations and structured networking — professional relationships that last a career.

✨
Holistic Development

Sports, culture, academics, and community service in one summit — the complete medical professional, built here.
